content.fact_text: Defined TypeScript contracts and Zod schemas for Users, Products, Orders, Payments, and Kafka events.

provenance_data.behaviour: Defines strongly typed Zod schemas and TypeScript interfaces for the entire ecommerce domain, ensuring consistent data structures across microservices.
provenance_data.utility: Provides the source of truth for data shapes across all microservices, enabling strict type safety and schema validation.
